scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Runtime.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/runtime diagnostics are covered by dotnet build'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/runtime lint is covered by F# compile'
